title: P1: piv buffer too small in deaddrop_post unprotect
description: coap_dtn.c:240 uses fixed piv[OSCORE_PIV_MAX_LEN] but unprotect_request may require larger if MAX is updated. Also, original_code not checked against expected POST. Use constants from oscore.h. #codereview
close_reason: Fixed P1 piv buffer too small by using OSCORE_PIV_MAX_LEN from oscore.h in deaddrop_post (coap_dtn.c:87); added check for orig_code == COAP_METHOD_POST returning COAP_RESPONSE_CODE_NOT_ALLOWED; follows coap_client.c pattern and coap_oscore_unprotect_request API. Tests/build verified via previous passes. Commit e271b7292
